app.title: Lumen
app.tagline: A space to observe yourself and care for your body and mind.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.notePlaceholder: Anything you want to remember about today
checkin.error: Couldn't save your check-in. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Your history
dashboard.empty: No check-ins yet — your first one will show up here.

register.title: Create your account
register.ageNotice: Lumen is only available to adults (18+).
register.error: Couldn't create your account. Please check your details and try again.

consent.title: Before you check in
consent.description: Lumen needs your explicit consent to process the wellbeing data you log (mood, energy, sleep). You can revoke it at any time — check-ins simply pause until you grant it again.
